overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through an ancient Egyptian temple complex with towering obelisks and palm trees, passing through a monumental gate, and continuing down a ceremonial avenue lined with sphinx statues and hanging banners under a clear desert sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian temple plaza with obelisks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the temple complex toward the monumental gate, observing the hieroglyphic walls and obelisks

notable_agents.action: child running across the plaza ahead

entered.detail: large sandstone wall with Egyptian hieroglyphic carvings and red banners hanging down
pair of tall dark granite obelisks with gold pyramidion tips standing in the plaza
tall date palm trees scattered throughout the temple grounds
rocky desert mountains visible in the background under the blue sky

segments.scene_description: Bayek walks through the open temple plaza with ancient stone walls covered in hieroglyphs on the left. Tall obelisks stand prominently in the center distance against a clear blue sky, while palm trees provide sparse shade. A child runs across the stone pavement on the right as the character approaches the monumental gate ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental temple gate flanked by obelisks

events.description: bright sun flare appears when approaching the gate entrance due to backlighting
passing between the two massive obelisks and through the ceremonial gate

agents.ego_description: passing through the monumental gate while looking up at the towering obelisks and examining the hieroglyphic details on the walls

entered.detail: large stone gateway with red and white ceremonial drapes hanging between the pillars
detailed Egyptian relief carvings showing figures and symbols on the gate walls

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the monumental gate framed by massive obelisks on either side, with bright sunlight creating a dramatic lens flare. Hieroglyphic carvings cover the stone walls, and the camera pans upward to emphasize the height of the obelisks against the blue sky before proceeding through the gateway.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial avenue with sphinx statues and hanging banners

events.description: eagle Senu lands on Bayek's left arm and perches there as he walks

agents.ego_description: walking down the ceremonial avenue with the eagle perched on his arm, passing other pedestrians and a horse rider while heading toward the distant temple

notable_agents.action: eagle landing on Bayek's arm and remaining perched there
man riding a horse across the avenue

entered.detail: white and blue fabric banners hanging between golden poles over the avenue
large stone sphinx statues on white pedestals lining the right side of the path
large temple structure with orange canopy visible at the end of the ceremonial avenue

segments.scene_description: Bayek continues down the wide ceremonial avenue scattered with flower petals, lined with sphinx statues on the right and palm trees. White banners hang overhead between poles, and an eagle lands on his arm to ride with him as he passes pedestrians and a horse rider, heading toward the distant temple structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ancient Egyptian temple plaza that transitions into a grand ceremonial avenue. It begins with Bayek walking across a stone pavement lined with hieroglyphic walls and sparse palm trees, passing a running child as he approaches a monumental gate. As he moves forward, the camera pans upward to capture the towering height of massive obelisks against a clear blue sky, while bright sunlight creates a dramatic lens flare upon passing through the gateway. The scene then opens into a wide avenue scattered with flower petals and lined with sphinx statues and hanging white banners. Finally, the camera follows Bayek as an eagle lands on his arm, gliding past pedestrians and a horse rider toward a distant temple structure.
